name: Coco-Nut Macadamia Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, salt, sugar, baking soda, and baking powder into a large mixing bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together buttermilk, eggs, melted butter, and Coco-Lopez.
3. Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients. Stir with a spoon until combined; the batter will be slightly lumpy.
4. Stir in shredded toasted coconut and chopped toasted macadamia nuts.
5. Brush a griddle or large pan with oil.
6. Heat the griddle to 400 degrees Fahrenheit (200 degrees Celsius).
7. Drop batter onto the hot griddle using a 4-ounce ladle.
8. Cook for about 3 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
9. Serve garnished with diced pineapple, maple syrup, and butter.
Note: Coco-Lopez is condensed coconut liquid available in the liquor section of many markets.
